industry.name: SimDaaS Autonomy Pvt. Ltd.
industry.description: Simulation platform for training and testing autonomous systems. Founded as an incubate at IIT Kanpur and received major seed funding in 2025.

industry.name: Geokno India Pvt. Ltd.
industry.description: The first LiDAR company incubated at IIT Kanpur and pioneer of LiDAR services in India. Acquired by GMR Group.

industry.name: AUS Pvt. Ltd.
industry.description: Mentored start-up incubated at IIT Kanpur developing indigenous UAV and photogrammetric based mapping systems.

industry.name: Nebula Cloud by GVB Geomatics
industry.description: Mentored company focused on the design of cloud-based product solutions and market outreach.

government.name: Department of Science & Technology (DST)
government.description: Sponsor for numerous ongoing NGP projects including tree morphology upscaling, emergency vehicle accessibility using LiDAR, and mathematical flood modeling.

government.name: National Mission for Clean Ganga (NMCG)
government.description: Executed Ganga LiDAR mapping for NMCG and the National Hydrology Project (NHP), surveying over 40,000 sq km.

government.name: National Highways Authority of India (NHAI)
government.description: Developed the methodology for Mobile LiDAR surveys for Road DPRs, leading NHAI to mandate LiDAR technology for such surveys nationwide.

government.name: Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO)
government.description: Collaborated on 3D City modeling, technology development for motion correction during laser scanning, and 3D imaging of strategic naval targets.

government.name: Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO)
government.description: Developed the waveform and topographic data simulator for the LLRI onboard the Chandrayaan-1 lunar mission.

government.name: IDEAS TiH - ISI Kolkata
government.description: Sponsored research for the development of deep learning and LiDAR-guided precision spraying tools for orchards.

academic.name: TU Wien (Vienna University of Technology), Austria
academic.description: Collaborative research on terrestrial and airborne laser scanning for tree volume and biomass estimation.

academic.name: University of Melbourne, Australia
academic.description: Joint PhD supervision and research on urban vegetation segmentation and city forest characterization.

academic.name: Texas A&M University (TAMU), USA
academic.description: Collaborative research on learning-based LiDAR intensity simulation and physics-informed neural network models.

academic.name: Indian Institute of Remote Sensing (IIRS), Dehradun
academic.description: Co-supervision of research on LiDAR-based vegetation applications.

persons.name: Prof. Y V N Krishna Murthy
